import 'package:freezed_annotation/freezed_annotation.dart';

part '__SCREEN_NAME___effect_state.freezed.dart';

@freezed
sealed class __ScreenName__EffectState with _$__ScreenName__EffectState {
  const factory __ScreenName__EffectState.showError({
    required String message,
  }) = __ScreenName__ShowErrorEffect;

  const factory __ScreenName__EffectState.showSavedMessage({
    required String message,
  }) = __ScreenName__ShowSavedMessageEffect;
}
